title: List of medical devices for exceptional importation and sale - Canada.ca
content:
## List of medical devices for exceptional importation and sale
Medical devices included on the list for exceptional importation and sale are called " designated medical devices ". They are eligible for exceptional importation and sale as per sections 62.27 to 62.32 of the Medical Devices Regulations . This list is incorporated by reference in these regulations. Health Canada maintains and updates this list as required.
Designated medical devices are eligible for exceptional importation into Canada before the date listed in the "Date after which the device may no longer be imported" column. Products cannot be exceptionally imported after this date, but products already imported may be sold until their expiry dates, if applicable, or for 2 years after the date listed in the "Date after which the device may no longer be imported" column.
Date issued: 2026-04-02 Supersedes: 2025-12-22
Access archived versions of this list.

Name of the manufacturer
Name of the importer and medical device establishment licence number
Country of authorization, name of foreign regulatory agency authorizing the device and authorization number (if applicable)
Date device added to this list
Date after which device may no longer be imported
